title: 9 Herbal Teas For Pertussis
description: Cinchona officinalis teas contains a compound called quinine, which is known for its ability to help with pertussis. Quinine has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can reduce the severity of coughing fits and alleviate symptoms. Cinchona officinalis tea also contains other alkaloids like cinchonine and cinchonidine, which have a calming effect on the respiratory system.
